name: Alder Run
region: North of Millhaven on the road toward Quel'Thalas

sensoryProfile.sight: Not seen directly on-page; described as barely more than six farms and a shrine on the north road.
sensoryProfile.sound: Known only through route intelligence, as the next quiet place that might still have ordinary life in it if the warning arrives soon enough.
sensoryProfile.smell: Implied rural smells of farms and shrine offerings rather than any direct on-page sensory read.
sensoryProfile.touch: A reported stop on the road, not yet entered by the POV.
sensoryProfile.atmosphere: A vulnerable near-future waypoint: small enough to be overlooked, exposed enough to matter.

establishedFacts.fact: Paret names Alder Run as the first settlement north of Millhaven, though he calls it hardly more than six farms and a shrine.
If the dead kept moving north out of Millhaven, Alder Run is one of the first places in their path.

eventsHere.event: Exists in chapter 3 as route intelligence attached to Sylvanas's northbound warning.
